## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New data source / adapter
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## How has this been tested?

Describe the tests you ran and how to reproduce them. Include the zoom level and region if the change affects the map.

- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Verified manually in the browser

## Screenshots

If the change is visual, add before / after screenshots.

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project conventions and is TypeScript.
- [ ] New data adapters map to the source-agnostic Business / Company shapes.
- [ ] I have not added code that hammers shared community APIs.
- [ ] I have updated documentation where needed.
- [ ] I have read the CONTRIBUTING guide.
